title: Do not default to the startup navigation template
summary: AI-generated marketing site navigation universally follows the same template: logo left, four center links (Product, Features, Pricing, About), and two right CTAs (Log In, Get Started).
instruction: Design navigation around the site's actual information architecture, not a template. The number and names of navigation items should reflect the content structure, not a pattern.
rationale: The five-link startup navigation (Product, Features, Pricing, About, Log In) is a recognizable template that makes every AI-generated marketing site feel identical. Navigation should reflect what makes the product different, not generic category labels.

violations: A landing page with exactly Logo, Product, Features, Pricing, About, Log In, Get Started in the navigation.
A B2B enterprise tool with a consumer-startup navigation template (same seven items).
controls: A documentation-site navigation reflecting the actual doc structure rather than marketing template.
A product-specific navigation naming features by their actual names rather than generic labels.
borderline: A startup where the four-link structure happens to match the actual IA after thoughtful design.

exceptions.description: Startups where the four-category structure accurately reflects the information architecture after deliberate design.
examples: A genuinely simple product with four features
A landing page where IA research validated the structure

detector.signalDescription: Extract navigation link labels. Compare against the template set {Product, Features, Pricing, About, Log In, Get Started}. Flag when 5+ labels match the template.
limitations: Some products genuinely have Product, Features, Pricing, and About sections.
Label synonyms ('Plans' vs 'Pricing', 'Sign In' vs 'Log In') may not match exact template names.

scenarios: A product whose actual IA maps naturally to the template labels.
A/B test results showing the template labels outperform alternatives.
mitigations: Check for label synonyms. Only flag when labels match the template nearly exactly (5 of 7 items). Accept documented IA rationale.

fixturePlan.description: A landing page with exactly Logo, Product, Features, Pricing, About, Log In, Get Started.
Same product with navigation reflecting its actual content structure.
A product whose IA genuinely maps to the template labels after research.
